arguments.summary: Added to_csv() method to Report class. Read tests/test_report.py (26 lines) — uses TestReport class with setup_method creating a report with 'Sales' title and 3 columns. Need to add CSV tests following same pattern.

arguments.content:
def test_to_csv_with_header(self):
        csv_output = self.report.to_csv()
        lines = csv_output.strip().split('\n')
        assert lines[0] == 'name,amount,date'
        assert lines[1] == 'Alice,100,2024-01-01'
        assert lines[2] == 'Bob,250,2024-01-02'

    def test_to_csv_no_header(self):
        csv_output = self.report.to_csv(include_header=False)
        lines = csv_output.strip().split('\n')
        assert len(lines) == 2
        assert 'name' not in lines[0]

    def test_to_csv_with_commas(self):
        self.report.add_row({'name': 'Carol, Jr.', 'amount': 75, 'date': '2024-01-03'})
        csv_output = self.report.to_csv()
        assert '"Carol, Jr."' in csv_output

    def test_to_csv_missing_column(self):
        self.report.add_row({'name': 'Dan'})
        csv_output = self.report.to_csv()
        lines = csv_output.strip().split('\n')
        assert lines[-1] == 'Dan,,'
